get.description: Retrieves transactions based on specified filters.

post.description: Adds a new category or a list of categories.

get.description: Retrieves all categories for a user.

schema.title: Response Get All Categories Categories  Get

get.description: Retrieves a list of primary categories.

schema.title: Response Get Primary Categories Categories Primary  Get

get.description: Retrieves a list of secondary categories.

schema.title: Response Get Secondary Categories Categories Secondary  Get

put.description: Edits the name of a category.

delete.description:
Deletes a category.
If some transaction uses that category, it will not be deleted.
If the category is a primary and has some secondary child, it will not be deleted.

post.description: Adds or updates a user-specific setting.

schema.title: Response Get Default Settings Settings Default  Get

post.description: Adds a currency for a user.

get.description: Retrieves all currencies for a user.

schema.title: Response Get Currencies Settings Currencies  Get
Response Get Available Currencies Settings Currencies Available  Get
